python_slug.label: Python executable
python_slug.description: Command used to invoke Python (for example: python3).

plugins.doctest.description: Configuration for doctest-based compilation and tests.

plugins.doctest.extra_args.label: Doctest extra args
plugins.doctest.extra_args.description: Compiler arguments passed when building doctest runs.

plugins.doctest.tests_file.label: Default tests file
plugins.doctest.tests_file.description: Optional tests file path. Leave null if tests are always passed via CLI.

plugins.clangtidy.description: Configuration for static analysis with clang-tidy.

plugins.clangtidy.config.label: Path to clang-tidy config
plugins.clangtidy.config.description: Optional path to a custom clang-tidy config file.

plugins.clangtidy.extra_args.label: clangtidy extra args
plugins.clangtidy.extra_args.description: Compiler/driver args passed to clang-tidy invocations.

plugins.metrixplusplus.metrics.label: metrixplusplus metrics
plugins.metrixplusplus.metrics.description: List of metrix++ metric IDs to collect.
